name: Tee It Up Canton
address: 7976 Whipple Ave NW, North Canton, OH 44720
about: Tee It Up Canton is a golf performance center in North Canton, Ohio, equipped with four indoor golf bays and a large putting green. The facility uses Foresight launch monitors, including two GCFalcons and two GCQuads, providing advanced ball and club-tracking technology. Bay rentals are priced at $30 per hour, with no per-person charges, and lessons are available with PGA-certified professionals.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Foresight launch monitors for accurate ball tracking
Hourly bay pricing is flat rate regardless of group size
Coaching available with PGA-certified professionals using launch monitor data

food_and_drink.notes: Free snacks provided; guests may bring their own food (no alcohol)
No alcohol permitted in the facility

simulator_hardware.notes: High-end radar launch monitor for ball and club tracking
High-end photometric launch monitor for ball and club tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own golf clubs to use in the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Yes, you may bring your own food and non-alcoholic beverages. The facility provides free water, soda, and snacks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: They recommend booking two hours to play a full 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility is designed for golfers of all skill levels, including juniors, and they offer lessons for beginners.
